themes.title: User Behavior Insights
themes.description: Focus on tracking and analyzing user behavior to enhance profiling.

themes.title: User Engagement and Preferences
themes.description: Develop features that enhance user engagement and allow users to express their preferences.

milestones.name: MVP Completion
milestones.description: Complete the foundational features for user behavior tracking and compliance.
milestones.success_criteria: User Behavior Tracking Pipeline and ML Recommendation Engine are operational, and GDPR compliance audit preparation is complete.

milestones.name: V1 Feature Set
milestones.description: Implement user engagement features and data export capabilities.
milestones.success_criteria: User Preference Dashboard, Cross-Device Tracking, Data Export, and Engagement Metrics are live and functioning.

sequencing.reason: V1 features depend on the successful implementation of MVP features.

mvp.goal: Establish core tracking and compliance features.

v1.goal: Enhance user engagement and data handling capabilities.

v2.goal: Further optimize and expand user profiling features.
